title: Add visitorCheckedInAsync(url) method to VisitorService
acceptance_criteria: Method visitorCheckedInAsync(url: string): Promise<VisitorWithAccessDto> added to the existing VisitorService
The url parameter is the raw URL decoded from the QR code — NOT a constructed endpoint
VisitorWithAccessDto type is used correctly (already exists in the file)
No other code in visitor-service.ts is modified
completion_summary: Added visitorCheckedInAsync(url: string): Promise<VisitorWithAccessDto> to the QR Code section of VisitorService using firstValueFrom
